steps.title: Read the behavior clue
steps.content: Anika is so busy making everyone else follow the proprieties that she fails to 'consider them herself.' Here, 'them' refers to the proprieties, or expected standards of behavior. The word must mean applying those standards to her own conduct.

steps.title: Rule out other meanings
steps.content: Choice B wrongly makes 'consider' mean admire and praise. Choice C means decide about, but Anika already knows the standards. Choice D means have an opinion on, which also misses the idea of following the proprieties in action. The answer is A.
